conbody.p: Overview: Provider Response Activity Report enables the CDI Manager to analyze provider responses at the clarification instance level and identify educational opportunities for the physicians, thereby ensuring high provider participation in the CDI program.

The report provides answers to the following questions.
Which diagnosis codes are most often in clarifications?
Is the content of a clarification resulting in “Not Agreed” clarifications? Or is this an opportunity for educating providers?
Do CDSs require significant follow-up to bring closure to a query?
Which providers are not responding to the clarifications sent by the CDS team? Which providers are the bottom and top responders to clarifications?
What is the average provider response turnaround time? Which providers should I target to help improve response turnaround time?
Which providers could benefit from additional education?
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE One CDI Operations Provider Response Activity .

Provider Response Activity displays the following:
Instances by Provider Response Chart
Clarifications by Subject Chart
Provider Response Summary
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in the charts and table.

Default Display: By default, the dashboard displays the data for the inpatient encounters admitted in the last one calendar month. Click the ‘Reset’ button to reset both admit date and discharge date and select the required date.

p.b: Provider Response Activity - Instances by Provider Response Chart

ul.li: X-axis: Displays the provider names

li.p: This chart displays the count of clarification instances for each provider broken down by instance responses. Example: The 'No Response' displays the count of clarification instances for which the response is No Response.
The provider is the 'Responded By' provider associated with the instance.

ul.li: Instances with 'Retracted' response are not displayed in the chart.
Sort: Sort by Provider with the highest count of instances to the provider with the lowest count of instances (descending order).

Exclusion Criteria:
Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Tooltip: Provider, Provider Response, Instances Responded
Info Icon(Text on hover): Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'. Instance Responses: Includes all instance responses except Retracted.

p.b: Provider Response Activity - Clarifications by Subject Chart

ul.li: The ‘Clarifications by Subject’ chart displays the count of clarifications sent with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED for each clarification subject.

li.note: Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.

ul.li:
Exclusion Criteria:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.
Unsent clarifications (Clarifications that do not have a sent date) are excluded from the counts.
Tooltip: Tooltip displays Clarification Subject (Format: R52 Pain, Unspecified) , Clarifications Sent (Format: 24 (11%); the percentage value is the '% of total sent' for each subject)
Info Icon(Text on hover): Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'. Clarification Status: Includes all clarification statuses except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'.

p.b: Provider Response Activity- Provider Response Summary

conbody.p: The provider column displays the provider that is Sent To provider or Responded By provider for at least one instance in the selected date range and filter criteria.
Info Icon(Text on hover): Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'. Clarification Status: Includes all clarification statuses except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'.
The following columns are displayed for each provider.

entry.p: The count of sent clarification instances with Response other than Retracted.
Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Retracted Instances are not considered for this calculation. (Instance Response= Retracted)
The count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response.
Example: 24 (88%)
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

% Responded = (The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response /The count of sent clarification instances with Response other than Retracted.) x 100
Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
The count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is Agreed.
Example: 24 (88%)
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
% Agreed = Instances with response as Agreed / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response x 100

row.entry: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.Instances for Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation

entry.p: The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Alternative Diagnosis".
Example: 14 (21%)
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

% Alternative Diagnosis = Instances with Response as "Alternative Diagnosis" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

row.entry:
Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Other Explanation".
Example: 14 (21%)
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
% Other Explanation = Instances with Response as "Other Explanation" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

row.entry:
Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Not Agreed".
Example: 2 (10%)
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
% Not Agreed = Instances with Response as "Not Agreed" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

row.entry:
Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Unable to Determine".
Example: 2 (10%)
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
% Unable to Determine = Instances with Response as "Unable to Determine" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

row.entry:
Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "No Response".
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
% No Response = Instances with Response as "No Response" / The count of clarification instances sent with Response other than Retracted ) x 100

row.entry:
Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: The count of sent clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for the reviewed encounters.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.

row.entry: Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: The count of sent clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.
Example: 42 (90%)

row.entry:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

entry.p: The count of sent clarifications with Final response as Agreed.
Example: 22 (88%)
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

row.entry: Clarifications with Final Response 'Alternative Specificity Diagnosis'

entry.p: The count of clarifications with Final response as Alternative Diagnosis.
Example: 12 (10%)
% Alternative Diagnosis = ((Overall Clarifications Alternative Diagnosis/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
The count of clarifications with Final response as Other Explanation.
Example: 12 (10%)
% Other Explanation = ((Overall Clarifications Other Explanation/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
The count of clarifications with Final response as Not Agreed.
Example: 12 (10%)
% Not Agreed = ((Overall Clarifications Not Agreed / Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

row.entry: Clarifications with Final Response 'Unable to Determine'

entry.p: The count of clarifications with Final response as Unable to Determine.
Example: 12 (10%)
% Unable to Determine = ((Overall Clarifications Unable to Determine/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
The count of clarifications with Final response as No Response.
Example: 12 (10%)
% No Response = ((Overall Clarifications with No Response/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
The Average Response TAT in hours for each 'Responded By' provider.

Avg. Response TAT (Hours) = Sum of Response TAT (Hours) of all the instances with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response/ Total count of instances Responded (with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) in hours.
Clarification Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Deleted and Retracted status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response are not considered in this metric calculation.

ul.li: Displays the admit date range here. You can select required dates from the date lookup
Default: Last 1 calendar months date range selected by default.
Displays the discharge date range here. You can select required dates from the date lookup.
With the Reset button, you can reset the admit date range.
Tooltip: Use "Ctrl + Click" to reset the Admit Date.
Displays a list of active and inactive facilities that you have access to. The list is sorted alphabetically.
You can select multiple facilities
You can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
Format: Facility Description (Facility ID)
Default: ALL
Displays a list of active and inactive CDSs associated with the facilities that you have access to . The list is alphabetically sorted.
The CDS Filter in all the reports displays the users with at-least CDS or CDS Manager role assigned.
"Unassigned CDS" displays data for the encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.
You can search the CDS by CDS ID or Name.
Format: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID)
Default: ALL
Displays a list of both active and inactive Providers that are Sent To provider or Responded By provider for at least one instance.

li.p: "Unassigned Provider" displays data for the encounters that do not have a provider assigned.

ul.li: You can search the Provider by name, suffix, title.

li.p: Format: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title

ul.li: Default: ALL

Displays the available patient types.
Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Default: Inpatient
Displays the list of available Visit Types.
You can select multiple Visit Types.
You can search the Visit Type.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available units.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Unit.
Default: ALL
Displays Weekend Only Stay values (Y/N).
You can search the Weekend Only Stay.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available Encounter Statuses.
You can select multiple Encounter Statuses.
You can search the Encounter Status.
Default: Review Not Needed unchecked by default.
Displays the list of available Admit Services.
You can select multiple Admit Services.
You can search the Admit Service.
Default: ALL

row.entry: Clarification that doesn't have a final response is counted multiple times for each ‘Sent To’ provider associated with the instances in that clarification.
